---
title: "Series Overview"
---

<img src="content/images/logo_lwg-long.png" alt="Logo for LegacyWorks Group" width="30%" align="right"/>

{{< fa person-digging >}} Under construction; check back later

<br>


:::{.callout-tip icon="false" collapse="false"}
## {{< fa brain >}} Learning Objectives

After completing this series, participants will be able to:

- **Assess** and screen potential projects for feasibility, impact, and alignment with LegacyWorks’ theory of change
- **Co-develop** a spectrum of success to guide project design
- **Design** an effective project scope, teaming structure, and budget
- **Employ** LWG systems, tools, and templates for detailed project planning, management and execution

:::

### Citing These Materials

{{< fa person-digging >}} Under construction; check back later

## Course Structure

:::{.panel-tabset}
### 2026-27 Structure

{{< fa person-digging >}} Under construction; check back later

:::

## Course Scheduling

:::{.panel-tabset}
### 2026-27 Schedule

| **Date** | **Series** | **Instructor(s)** |
|:-----:|:-----------------|:---------|
| Aug. 6, 2026 | 1. Project Selection & Design | <span style="color:#4AB2CB">{{< fa people-group >}} Jess </span> <br> <span style="color:#4AB2CB">{{< fa people-group >}} Michelle </span> <br> <span style="color:#4AB2CB">{{< fa people-group >}} Elle </span> <br> <span style="color:#4AB2CB">{{< fa people-group >}} Allison </span> |
| Sep. 3, 2026 | 2. Project Management & Execution | <span style="color:#4AB2CB">{{< fa people-group >}} Jess </span> <br> <span style="color:#4AB2CB">{{< fa people-group >}} Michelle </span> <br> <span style="color:#4AB2CB">{{< fa people-group >}} Elle </span> <br> <span style="color:#4AB2CB">{{< fa people-group >}} Allison </span> |

:::

## Course Policies

{{< fa person-digging >}} Under construction; check back later
